op.text: Conflict as of 2025-04-27: Priya asked to borrow $8,000 for ceramics studio lease deposit and buildout; Dana declined immediately citing uncertain finances (Austin decision pending) and policy against mixing money and friendship (informed by past experience lending to an ex); delivery was abrupt and hurt the friendship; Priya responded with 'very quiet and then very polite' withdrawal; have skipped pottery class twice in nearly two weeks since; Dana describes it as 'too raw' to repair yet
[as of 2025-04-27] Walking boot removal scheduled for Thursday 2025-04-30; physical therapy to begin after boot removal; orthopedist reports ankle healing on schedule
[as of 2025-04-27] Sam's Austin job decision deadline is approximately one week from 2025-04-27 (early May 2025)

op.note: Session 2025-04-27 shows significant strain: loan request refused, two pottery classes skipped, communication breakdown. Relationship currently damaged but Dana expresses intent to repair ('not yet, though').
